title: ixeris gracilis var. khasiana
intro: Ixeris gracilis var. khasiana, also known as Himalayan daisy or Khasia daisy, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. Ixeris gracilis var. khasiana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
